UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, HECTOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 SIXTH STREET, ROOM #626, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS CANCELED***; ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
